subject: [CPS] Ncmp dmi plugin kafka parameter ov
commit_message:
[CPS] Ncmp dmi plugin kafka parameter ov

- Explicitly providing kafka parameters in the application-helm file to
  be overridden later from the charts
- https://jira.onap.org/browse/CPS-1088 - adding missed OOM chart update
  coz of this task
- temporarily enabling the DEBUG level logs

Issue-ID: CPS-1510
Change-Id: I5a82771042f9a2f700172549ac561bc73ff35906
Signed-off-by: mpriyank <priyank.maheshwari@est.tech>

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/6354/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/6354/ )

I am guessing that the kafka config for ncmp-dmi is ok.
https://logs.onap.org/onap-integration/gating//133394-9/k8s-teardown/k8s-teardown/kubernetes-status/pod-onap-ncmp-dmi-plugin-c77c46bcc-c46hv-ncmp-dmi-plugin.log

Have we though about how the topic names will be passed to the apps them selves?
